analysis_result: 12/19 (63.2%) of atypical neurofibroma samples have NF1 somatic mutations (PASS filter, non-synonymous).
denominator_used: N = 19 ; definition: atypical NF samples (Tumor Type == 'Atypical_NF') with WES data present in the MOESM5 MAF (Tumor_Sample_Barcode = 'Tumor_' + WES label)
assumptions_made: Non-synonymous Variant_Classification includes Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del/Ins, Splice_Site, In_Frame_Del/Ins, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop_Mutation (Silent excluded); Sample barcode constructed as 'Tumor_' + WES label per question; denominator is atypical NF samples actually present in the MOESM5 MAF (those with detected WES variants)
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- MOESM4: 108 rows, 15 cols. Used Tumor_ID, Tumor Type, WES, WES label
- MOESM5: 7457 rows, 123 cols. Used Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Hugo_Symbol, Variant_Classification, FILTER

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- Start: 108 tumor samples in MOESM4
- Filter: Tumor Type == 'Atypical_NF' -> 21 samples
- Filter: has WES data (WES column == 'X') -> 20 samples with WES label
- After constructing barcode 'Tumor_' + WES label and matching to MOESM5 Tumor_Sample_Barcode: 19 atypical NF samples present in MAF
- Missing barcodes (had WES mark but not in MOESM5): ['Tumor_2178']

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Barcode mapping: Tumor_Sample_Barcode = 'Tumor_' + WES label
- Non-synonymous Variant_Classification (included): Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del, Frame_Shift_Ins, Splice_Site, In_Frame_Del, In_Frame_Ins, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop_Mutation
- Synonymous (excluded): Silent
- FILTER == 'PASS' (all 7457 rows in MOESM5 already have FILTER==PASS)

D. COMPUTATION
- Filtered MOESM5 on FILTER==PASS AND Hugo_Symbol=='NF1' AND non-synonymous Variant_Classification
- Atypical NF samples with >=1 qualifying NF1 mutation: 12
- Denominator (Atypical NF WES samples present in MAF): 19
- Frequency = 12/19 = 63.16%

E. RESULT
12/19 (63.2%) of atypical neurofibroma samples have NF1 somatic mutations (PASS, non-synonymous).

Specific atypical NF barcodes with NF1 mutations: ['Tumor_1117', 'Tumor_1349', 'Tumor_1729', 'Tumor_1799', 'Tumor_1856', 'Tumor_1874', 'Tumor_1901', 'Tumor_2401', 'Tumor_2477', 'Tumor_2503', 'Tumor_2797', 'Tumor_990']

F. CAVEATS
- Alternative denominator using all atypical NF with WES mark in MOESM4 (n=20) gives 60.0%
- Some atypical NF samples marked with WES may not appear in MOESM5 (missing: ['Tumor_2178'])
- All mutations in MOESM5 already have FILTER==PASS, so that filter did not change the set
- Non-synonymous classification excludes Silent mutations per standard MAF convention
